-nfh.description: Reduce or remove free party heals: inns cost more, recovery springs get random effects, free beds may trigger ambush, and scripted full heals are removed

-seri.description: Increase base price of most restorative items (Potions, Ethers, Tents, etc.)

-sli.description: Shops sell items in limited packs. Each item slot can only be bought once

-oops.description: Oops, all boss! Replace all bosses with the specified boss enemy ID or name, or random.

-who.description: Whos There? Bosses look like Imps and have the name ??????

-steve.description: Steveify the seed: rename all characters, items, espers, magic, enemies, etc. to a given name (default: Steve)
